mapper.select: SELECT ulp.id, ulp.listening_id, lm.title, ulp.duration, ulp.progress, ulp.understood_count, ulp.familiar_count, ulp.unfamiliar_count, ulp.updated_at FROM user_listening_progress ulp INNER JOIN listening_materials lm ON ulp.listening_id = lm.id WHERE ulp.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY ulp.updated_at DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT COALESCE(SUM(duration), 0) as totalListeningTime, COALESCE( SUM(CASE WHEN understood_count > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0 ) as totalUnderstood, COALESCE( SUM(CASE WHEN familiar_count > 0 AND understood_count = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0 ) as totalFamiliar, COALESCE( SUM(CASE WHEN unfamiliar_count > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0 ) as totalUnfamiliar FROM user_listening_progress WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_listening_progress (id, user_id, listening_id, duration, progress, understood_count, familiar_count, unfamiliar_count, last_position, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{userId}, #{listeningId}, #{duration}, #{progress}, #{understoodCount}, #{familiarCount}, #{unfamiliarCount}, #{lastPosition}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE user_listening_progress SET duration = #{duration}, progress = #{progress}, understood_count = #{understoodCount}, familiar_count = #{familiarCount}, unfamiliar_count = #{unfamiliarCount}, last_position = #{lastPosition}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND listening_id = #{listeningId}
mapper.select: SELECT ulp.id, ulp.listening_id, lm.title, ulp.duration, ulp.progress, ulp.understood_count, ulp.familiar_count, ulp.unfamiliar_count, ulp.updated_at FROM user_listening_progress ulp INNER JOIN listening_materials lm ON ulp.listening_id = lm.id WHERE ulp.user_id = #{userId} AND ulp.listening_id = #{listeningId}
